name: Clinton Pickleball Club @ Cascades
description: Clinton Pickleball Club @ Cascades is a place to play pickleball in Clinton, MS. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — FREE for 4 hour session (per person). Memberships to begin in 2025

name: Clinton Pickleball Park
description: Come play pickleball at Clinton Pickleball Park in Clinton, MS! There are 8 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and water. The courts are free.

name: First Baptist Jackson Fitness & Recreation
description: First Baptist Jackson Fitness & Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MS. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Flower City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Flower City Park in Jackson, MS! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: Kids Towne Park
description: Kids Towne Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clinton, MS. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Parham Bridges Tennis Center
description: Parham Bridges Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MS. There are 10 outdoor clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights and a pro shop or equipment store.

name: Pickleball Warriors
description: Come play pickleball at Pickleball Warriors in Raymond, MS! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $7 for 2 hour open play

name: River Hills Club
description: Come play pickleball at River Hills Club in Jackson, MS! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. A membership is required to play.

name: The Country Club of Jackson
description: The Country Club of Jackson is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MS. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: The Jar
description: The Jar is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MS. There are 2 hard courts. 1 is outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: The Pickle Jar
description: The Pickle Jar is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jackson, MS. There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include food, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Offers monthly memberships and drop in play. Pricing | Drop in: singles-$10 per person, doubles- $8 per person. Monthly Membership | 1X monthly fee, booking is free
